_about: External skill repositories curated by AI-SKILL. Each entry is a known-good source of SKILL.md files. The /external page renders this list as a directory the user can browse and jump to. Update this file when a new upstream releases a skill library.

repos.description_en: Anthropic's official skill library. Heavy Claude-artifact skills (pdf, docx, theme-factory, canvas-design) and a few that generalise (mcp-builder, skill-creator, doc-coauthoring).
repos.description_zh: Anthropic 官方技能库。包含较多 Claude artifact 技能（pdf、docx、theme-factory、canvas-design），也有一批可通用化的（mcp-builder、skill-creator、doc-coauthoring）。

repos.description_en: Cookbook-style example skills: financial-statement analysis, brand-guidelines application, financial-model generation. Notebook-driven, not production-shaped.
repos.description_zh: Cookbook 风格的示例技能：财报分析、品牌规范应用、财务模型生成。偏 notebook 演示，不是生产形态。

repos.description_en: OpenAI's curated + system skills for Codex. AppSec-focused (threat-model, secure-code-by-language, ownership-bus-factor) plus Codex workflow helpers (goal-definition, pr-yeet).
repos.description_zh: OpenAI 给 Codex 用的 curated + system 技能集。以 AppSec 为主（threat-model、secure-code-by-language、ownership-bus-factor），附带 Codex 工作流辅助（goal-definition、pr-yeet）。

repos.description_en: The realtime-eval-bootstrap skill lives in examples/evals/. Most of the repo is notebooks, not skills. Use the cookbook to learn patterns, not to grab ready-made skills.
repos.description_zh: realtime-eval-bootstrap 技能位于 examples/evals/。仓库主体是 notebook，不是技能。当作模式参考用，不要期望能直接抓出大量成品技能。

repos.description_en: Langfuse's `.agents/skills/` directory is a goldmine of practical, opinionated engineering skills: code-review, clickhouse-best-practices, storybook, turborepo, security-review. Several are vendor-neutral after we re-typo them.
repos.description_zh: Langfuse 仓库里的 `.agents/skills/` 是一堆实用的、明确表态的工程技能：code-review、clickhouse-best-practices、storybook、turborepo、security-review。我们改了内部路径后大部分都能 vendor-neutral 化。

repos.description_en: Hugging Face's skills are mostly HF-platform-specific (datasets, spaces, gradio, trackio). Two generalise: transformers-js for in-browser inference and train-sentence-transformers for embedding training.
repos.description_zh: Hugging Face 的技能大部分是平台专用（datasets、spaces、gradio、trackio）。其中两条可以通用化：transformers-js 浏览器端推理，train-sentence-transformers 训练 embedding。

repos.description_en: Letta's skill library is mostly platform-locked (letta/ SDK usage, fleet management) or single-tool-locked (1password, discord, notion, slack). One generalises: frontend-visual-design.
repos.description_zh: Letta 的技能库大部分绑死在自家平台（letta/ SDK 用法、fleet management）或单一工具（1password、discord、notion、slack）。能通用化的只有 frontend-visual-design。

repos.description_en: Promptfoo ships skills for red-team plugin development, eval setup, provider setup, and search-params. The redteam tag protocol (`<UserQuery>`, `<purpose>`, `<Output>`, `<AllowedEntities>`) is the most reusable piece.
repos.description_zh: Promptfoo 自带的技能覆盖 redteam 插件开发、eval 套件、provider setup、search-params。最值得复用的是 redteam 的 tag 协议（`<UserQuery>`、`<purpose>`、`<Output>`、`<AllowedEntities>`）。

repos.description_en: Deepeval's three skills: deepeval-otel (OTLP tracing), deepeval-tracing (framework integration recipes), deepeval-eval-suite (general pytest eval pattern). The OTLP one generalises to any tracing backend.
repos.description_zh: Deepeval 的三个技能：deepeval-otel（OTLP tracing）、deepeval-tracing（框架集成示例）、deepeval-eval-suite（通用 pytest eval 套件）。OTLP 那条对任何 tracing 后端都通用。

repos.description_en: Listed again as 'anthropics/anthropic-cookbook' — same content as the entry above. The hash-dashed path matters for source.commit pinning in our index.
repos.description_zh: 和上面那条重复列出，源仓库标识是 anthropics/anthropic-cookbook。源 commit 固定时 path 区分有意义。

repos.description_en: A community-driven library of prompt snippets. The .windsurf/skills/ directory has a handful of re-typed skills (book-translation, widget-generator). Most of the prompts are raw YAML in /prompts/.
repos.description_zh: 社区驱动的 prompt 片段库。`.windsurf/skills/` 里有少量重写过的技能（book-translation、widget-generator）。主体 prompt 在 `/prompts/` 是裸 YAML。

repos.description_en: Agno's cookbook/ directory has example skills (git-workflow, system-info, haiku). They're thin and intended as templates — useful as a starting shape, less so as final products.
repos.description_zh: Agno 的 cookbook/ 里有些示例技能（git-workflow、system-info、haiku）。都比较薄，更适合当模板起点，不是最终成品。
